allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add panel IV estimation for broadband demand elasticity

- Implement IV/2SLS with multiple instrument combinations
- Test mobile price, regulatory quality, and lagged prices as instruments
- Include regional heterogeneity via Price×EaP interaction
- Add first-stage diagnostics, Hausman test, Hansen J-test
- Generate LaTeX tables for paper
- Results show weak instruments problem for mobile/reg quality
- Lagged prices provide strong instruments (F>10) but near-zero elasticities

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add IV estimation summary and recommendations for paper

- Document methodology, results, and diagnostic findings
- Provide recommendations for presenting results in paper
- Include suggested text for methods, results, and limitations sections
- Summarize weak instruments problem and interpretation guidance

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
